# Safe Refactor Engine

> Language-agnostic refactoring skill for agentic coding workflows.

## Installable Skill

- `skills/safe-refactor-engine/SKILL.md`: primary skill instructions
- `skills/safe-refactor-engine/agents/openai.yaml`: UI metadata and default prompt
- `skills/safe-refactor-engine/references/slicing.md`: slice design guidance
- `skills/safe-refactor-engine/references/patterns.md`: refactor pattern guidance
- `skills/safe-refactor-engine/references/verification.md`: verification guidance
- `skills/safe-refactor-engine/references/evaluation.md`: evaluation prompts and rubric context
- `skills/safe-refactor-engine/references/real-world-validation.md`: real-task validation guidance
- `skills/safe-refactor-engine/scripts/quick_validate.py`: structural validator
- `skills/safe-refactor-engine/scripts/score_evaluation.py`: evaluation scoring helper

## Repository Docs

- `README.md`: overview, installation, usage, and validation
- `CONTRIBUTING.md`: contribution and packaging expectations
- `references/workflow.md`: repository-level workflow guidance
- `references/slicing.md`: repository-level slicing guidance
- `references/verification.md`: repository-level verification guidance
- `references/patterns.md`: repository-level refactor patterns

## Intended Use

Use this skill when the user wants a safe refactor, structure cleanup, extraction, decomposition, or coupling reduction without unintended behavior changes.

The skill emphasizes:

- clarification of user intent only when ambiguity is real
- technical grounding through local tools and official docs
- behavior-preserving slices
- explicit rollback boundaries
- per-slice verification
